description: Proposed, rejected, superseded, and resolved memory items must never be retrieved into the turn context. Only the single accepted item should appear.
userMessage: Which provider should we default to for routine operator work, and what is the standing reply-style preference?

selectedMemoryItemsMustContain: Default to Gemini for routine operator use.
selectedMemoryItemsMustNotContain: Default to Anthropic for routine operator use.
userPromptMustContain: Default to Gemini for routine operator use.
